pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code will not compile for Java 21 features or may fail runtime checks if compiled for an older version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Classes in javax.annotation package are no longer available or mapped in Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors.
